title: Disney World Has Officially Replaced Aerosmith With Muppets Covering Blur

title: Weezer Announce New (Gold) Album: Hear “We Might As Well Be Strangers” (Feat. Wednesday)
caption: 🎉 Ready to rock out? Weezer drops news of a shiny new album! 🌟 Listen to "We Might As Well Be Strangers" ft. Wednesday now! 🎶 #WeezerGoldAlbum 🤘
